text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is a branch of computer science that creates machines capable of performing tasks that normally require human intelligence. One important type of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data without being explicitly programmed for every step. A more advanced form is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks to analyze large amounts of information. You encounter AI in daily life through virtual assistants like Siri, recommendation systems on Netflix or Amazon, and even smart home devices. These applications learn from your behavior to improve their responses over time.
